title: Oil extends slide as investors assess Trump comments on Iran war, Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Oil prices plunged after Trump warned that Tehran would be hit "twenty times harder" if it attempted to halt oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Oil prices plunged after Trump warned that Tehran would be hit "twenty times harder" if it attempted to halt oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump warned that Tehran would be hit "twenty times harder"
